/** * @fileoverview Package exports for @eslint/eslintrc * @author Nicholas C. Zakas */ //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // Requirements //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ import * as ConfigOps from "./shared/config-ops.js"; import ConfigValidator from "./shared/config-validator.js"; import * as naming from "./shared/naming.js"; import environments from "../conf/environments.js"; //----------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Exports //----------------------------------------------------------------------------- const Legacy = { environments, // shared ConfigOps, ConfigValidator, naming }; export { Legacy };
